GameCanvas - Class in jGameLib.ecs.ui2d
A canvas on which to draw stuff.

GameState - Class in jGameLib.ecs
An abstract class representing a game state in a StateMachine

Constructs a GameState
GameWindow - Class in jGameLib.ecs.ui2d
A basic class representing a game window.
GameWindow(String) - Constructor for class jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.GameWindow
Constructs a GameWindow with a minimum size of 1280 x 720 and a reference resolution of 1920 x 1080.
GameWindow(String, Vec2) - Constructor for class jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.GameWindow
Constructs a GameWindow with a minimum size and a reference resolution of 1920 x 1080.
GameWindow(String, Vec2, Vec2) - Constructor for class jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.GameWindow
Constructs a GameWindow with a minimum size and a custom reference resolution
